name: Entertainer
description: The crowd is your stage and attention is your currency. You’ve learned how to command eyes, stir emotion, and shape the mood of any gathering through presence alone.

feats.name: Captivating Presence
feats.description: When you perform or engage an audience through **Performance** or **Persuasion**, you gain **Resolve** on the check. On a **critical success**, you gain additional +1 Skill Checks related to **Social** on affected targets until the next day.
